sources.title: feedback: pillar28 ui feedback: and ios sovereignty

decision.statement: Wire the DRK kernel to its live providers and add a daily proactive scanner
decision.problem: The kernel composed injected provider verdicts and was fixture-tested only; nothing called it, and it only answered when asked. A decision authority nobody invokes is documentation.
options: SessionStart hook instead of a scheduled task
leave the kernel on the bench
decision.rationale: Adapters make the composition real; the scanner makes it proactive. A daily out-of-band task costs the interactive flow nothing, whereas SessionStart and the Stop chain are the two most contended surfaces in the pack.
accepted_risks: a proactive scanner that emits too much becomes noise and is ignored (T-DRK-PROACTIVE-NOISE-001)
the adapters couple DRK to five modules whose signatures may drift

evidence.claim: All six provider signatures read from source; three asserted premises were false
Live kernel produces verdicts from real providers; 18/18 V-gates hermetic x3; V-BASELINE green
The scanner must never block the interactive workflow

predicted_consequences.claim: the daily scan surfaces at least one real actionable finding per week
predicted_consequences.observable: count of urgency>=medium rows in vault/audits/drk_proactive_*.md

predicted_consequences.claim: the scanner does not become noise the Owner ignores
predicted_consequences.observable: OWNER_QUEUE rows with source=drk-proactive completed vs aged past 30d
